# A pipeline with command_topic set lets a mess chat command approve a review
# stage: the daemon subscribes to the topic and listens (using its own dedicated
# mess identity, never an ambient/inherited one — see daemonMessIdentity), maps
# the sender to a breeze identity via MessTarget, enforces the approval stage's
# normal RBAC, and replies in the topic. Hermetic here via a fake `mess` script
# on PATH, like notify_mess*.txt.
env BREEZE_DIR=$WORK/state
env PATH=$WORK/bin:$PATH
chmod 0755 bin/mess

exec breeze identity register admin
cp stdout admin.token
exec breeze identity register alice --mess-agent alice-on-mess
exec breeze role assign reviewer alice --as admin --token-file admin.token

exec breeze apply -f pipeline.hcl --as admin --token-file admin.token
exec breeze stage start release build abc123 --as ci
stdout 'build: succeeded'

# command_topic subscriptions are established once, at daemon startup (see
# Pipeline.CommandTopic's doc comment) -- the pipeline was registered AFTER the
# daemon auto-started, so restart to pick it up.
exec breeze daemon restart
exec sleep 1

exists mess-calls.log
# the daemon subscribed using its OWN dedicated identity (a hash of its state
# dir), never an ambient/inherited one.
grep 'sub #release-approvals --as breeze-daemon-[0-9a-f]{8}' mess-calls.log

# The fake `mess listen` emits one canned "@breeze approve ..." message from
# alice-on-mess -- the daemon should map her to breeze identity alice (who holds
# the reviewer role), approve, and reply in the topic. The reply uses the
# inbound message's own Topic value verbatim (never "#"-prefixed -- that's how
# mess actually delivers it, see normalizeMessTopic), not the "#name" form
# CommandTopic itself is authored with.
grep 'pub release-approvals breeze: release/review \(abc123\) approved by alice -> succeeded --thread m1 --as breeze-daemon-[0-9a-f]{8}' mess-calls.log

exec breeze pipeline status release abc123 --json
stdout '"stage":\s*"review"[\s\S]*"status":\s*"succeeded"'
stdout '"identity":\s*"alice"'
stdout '"brief":\s*"\(via mess from alice-on-mess\) lgtm via chat"'

exec breeze stop

-- bin/mess --
#!/bin/sh
case "$1" in
  listen)
    echo '{"id":"m1","from":"alice-on-mess","topic":"release-approvals","kind":"topic","body":"@breeze approve release/review abc123 --brief lgtm via chat"}'
    sleep 300
    ;;
  *)
    echo "$@" >> mess-calls.log
    ;;
esac

-- pipeline.hcl --
pipeline "release" {
  command_topic = "#release-approvals"

  stage "build" {
    type    = "command"
    timeout = "10s"
    command = ["/bin/true"]
  }
  stage "review" {
    type               = "approval"
    required_approvals = 1
    approver_role      = "reviewer"
  }
}
